No tasks yet — add one above or speak it!

🎯

Jira integration is only available in local mode.

This hosted version can't reach your Jira proxy. Download the source, run it locally with VS Code Live Server, and Jira sync works out of the box.

🔗 Get the code on GitHub
⚙️

Start the proxy in a terminal (node jira-proxy.js), then open Settings to configure your Jira URL.

⚙️ Settings
💾 Data
🎨 Theme & Appearance
Corner rounding 6px
Background Card Accent
☁️ Google Drive Family Sync

Created by the family admin in Google Cloud Console. Shared with all family members.

The ID portion of the Drive file URL, shared by the family admin.

Names shown in assignment dropdowns. Add your own name here too.

✎ Edit Task
⚡ Brain Dump
Space to open · click Capture · Esc to cancel
